steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The task asks to “emphasize a similarity” between the two TV programs—meaning the goal is to show what they have in common, not their differences.

steps.title: Select the choice that reveals common ground
steps.content: Choice B accomplishes this by opening with their shared defining feature—both programs document ordinary events in real time—and explicitly identifying both as slow TV documentaries. The other three either highlight differences (A contrasts the specific content documented; C contrasts the durations) or fail to make a two-program comparison (D describes only one). That matches choice B — B is correct.
